---
title: "Interpolation and Fitting"
description: |
  Exploration in interpolation and fitting methods.
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```


# Notes

![Graph Theory 01](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-01.png){width=50%}![Graph Theory 02](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-02.png){width=50%}
![Graph Theory 03](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-03.png){width=50%}![Graph Theory 04](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-04.png){width=50%}

![Graph Theory 05](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-05.png){width=50%}![Graph Theory 06](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-06.png){width=50%}

![Graph Theory 07](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-07.png){width=50%}![Graph Theory 08](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-08.png){width=50%}

![Graph Theory 09](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-09.png){width=50%}![Graph Theory 10](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-10.png){width=50%}

![Graph Theory 11](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-11.png){width=50%}![Graph Theory 12](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-12.png){width=50%}

![Graph Theory 13](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-13.png){width=50%}![Graph Theory 14](images/03-Interpolation-Fitting/Interpolation-Fitting-14.png){width=50%}
